descriptionShort: Orland Kurtenbach inducted into Vancouver Canucks Ring of Honour ceremony in 2010.
descriptionLong: Archival footage from October 2010 capturing Orland Kurtenbach's induction into the Vancouver Canucks Ring of Honour. This is a notable pro-career milestone for the former Canucks captain, though connection to the 1987 Richmond Sockeyes is ambiguous and may be peripheral to the primary archive focus.
